title: excoecaria klotzschii
intro: Excoecaria klotzschii, also known as the Poison Tree or Manchineel Tree, is a tropical tree native to the Americas, particularly in the Caribbean and Central America. The plant is known for its toxic sap, which has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Excoecaria klotzschii include wound healing, antiseptic properties, and potential treatment for skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including salves, ointments, and tinctures, which are applied topically to the affected area.
